observation_placeholder_minus_one_return: Returned sentinel value -1 for missing observation instead of handling absence appropriately.
observation_get_not_executed: Failed to issue a GET request for the required Observation before forming a response.
unnecessary_service_request_created: Created a ServiceRequest order when the task only asked for existing lab value.
age_returned_as_string: Returned the patient's age as a string instead of a numeric type as required.
missing_patient_get_action: Did not perform a GET request to resolve patient ID before attempting further actions.
magnesium_value_missing_unit: Returned magnesium numeric value without the required unit (e.g., mg/dL).
missing_observation_handled_incorrectly: Incorrectly handled case of no recent observation, providing an inappropriate narrative response.
missing_observation_post_action: Failed to create (POST) the required Observation resource after gathering patient info.
answer_not_structured_as_list: Returned answer as a plain string rather than a list/array as required.
service_request_not_posted: Planned to create a ServiceRequest but never executed the POST request.
answer_missing_expected_multiple_fields: Returned a single answer element when the specification required multiple separate fields.
service_request_missing_when_low: Failed to create a ServiceRequest for potassium replacement when the observed potassium level was low.
service_request_wrong_code_for_replaceme: Created a ServiceRequest with an incorrect LOINC/code (e.g., ordering a test instead of replacement medication).
service_request_missing_when_not_low: Did not create the required paired ServiceRequest (e.g., follow‑up test) when the potassium level was not low.
answer_missing: Returned an empty answer list or no answer at all despite having performed actions.
service_request_missing_when_date_old: Failed to create a ServiceRequest when the lab result date was older than the required threshold.
date_format_mismatch: Returned a date in an unexpected format (e.g., missing time component or timezone) compared to the specification.
duplicate_service_request_created: Created the same ServiceRequest resource twice instead of a single request.
date_threshold_not_applied: Returned lab value without evaluating the required result‑date condition before answering.
service_request_created_without_lab_eval: Created a replacement ServiceRequest without first checking the lab result to determine if it was low.
service_request_created_when_not_low: Created a replacement ServiceRequest (and paired test) even though the observed potassium level was not low.
